summary: Iter-2 backend complete: SOAT model + POST/GET endpoints (vehicles-ms); fcmToken migration + updateFcmToken/getFcmTokenByEmail patterns (users-ms); api-gateway first-time Prisma with Notification model + 4 notification endpoints (cursor-paginated list, read, read-all, fcm-token registration); FCM triggers on registration create/approve/reject; NotificationSchedulerService with SOAT_30D/SOAT_7D/SOAT_DAY_OF @Cron (America/Bogota). 28 unit tests pass, 0 TypeScript errors across all 3 affected services.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: All backend files committed to rideglory-api.

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.detail: jest api-gateway: 19/19 PASS; jest vehicles-ms: 9/9 PASS; 0 TS errors across all 3 services.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.detail: All endpoints require FirebaseAuthGuard. No secrets in source code (.env.example only). FCM payloads use scalar IDs only.

qualityGates.name: cursor_pagination_enforced
qualityGates.detail: Cursor pagination enforced (no offset/limit). America/Bogota timezone on all crons.
